rulings.Case Title: 490 TANZANITE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIOMITED LIABILITY VS. PROPARK AMERICA WEST LLC, A CONNECTICUT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 20, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF 490 TANZANITE LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIOMITED LIABILITY's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel Hearing Required to Address Defendant's Motion for Attorney's Fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE MICHAEL SHUEY VS. KARIN L ANDERSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Defendant Karin L. Andersons Motion And Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 20, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT KARIN ANDERSON's Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show by preponderance of evidence the probably validity of a real property claim. This includes the currently alleged remedy of constructive trust and the proposed claim for resulting trust. Defendant's objections to Plaintiff's evidence are well-taken and are sustained. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL DOUGLAS ET AL VS. DAHLIA HOTEL, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint To Include Additional Named Plaintiffs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 20, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFFS MICHAEL DOUGLAS, NORMAN HAMPTON, MARK SAPP, JEROME ELLIS, KENNETH MCQUOWN, MICHAEL PEARSON and RAMONA DE LA TORRES' Motion For Leave To Amend The Complaint To Include Additional Named Plaintiffs GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is Denied as to James Johnson and Wayne Johnson. Motion is otherwise granted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PETER M OWENS VS. IRIS CANADA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Third Demand For Inspection Of Real Property And Request For Sanctions

PLAINTIFFS PETER OWENS, CAROLYN RADISCH and STEPHEN OWENS' Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs Third Demand For Inspection Of Real Property And Request For Sanctions transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on September 4, 2015. Parties to provide courtesy copies to department 301 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date no later than August 20, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BENJAMIN DAVID MARTIN VS. RAYMOND BROWN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Ray Brown To Appear For Deposition And Provide Meaningful Responses Rather Than Just Repeating "I Don'T Know How To Answer That, Sir" And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 20, 2015 line 7. PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN MARTIN's Motion To Compel Defendant Ray Brown To Appear For Deposition And Provide Meaningful Reesponses Rather Than Just Repeating "I Don'T Know How To answer That, Sir" And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED.
